purpose: Record exact authenticated route retries for public/draft scaffold packages whose marketplace detail slugs fall back to the marketplace index without exposing reportData.

sourceArtifacts.use: Opened each exact Sequencing.com marketplace slug in a temporary in-app browser tab and extracted final URL, Next.js page-props keys, and reportData availability.
Records the strict no-promotion decision and required promotion evidence for each public/draft scaffold package.

promotionBoundary.reason: These exact slug retries resolved to the generic Sequencing.com marketplace index, not a report detail page. They exposed no pageProps.reportData, sample report file, generated output rows, formal output schema, or row-level citation bindings.

entries.title: Ehlers-Danlos Syndrome
entries.documentTitle: Sequencing Marketplace | DNA Reports, Apps & Test Kits
requiredEvidenceForPromotion: Direct Ehlers-Danlos or hEDS Sequencing.com report output
Exact EDS reportData payload with sample rows or non-empty reportFile
Row-level source bindings for EDS-specific rows
